description: Composition Black sleeveless round neck top made of 95% viscose and 5% lycra, has a ruffled neck, pearl, stone and metal embellishments Fit Regular Wash care Wash with warm water Do not bleach, use chlorine or iron on print Use warm iron arrow woman caters to fashionistas with a taste for the exotic. This top is a glamourised version of the typical tee with its slim silhouette and studs. Pair it with richly hued denims, sky high heels and a scarf. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
